_comment: Thunder Celestial Beast (雷仙兽) — Renegade Immortal. Canon confidence: 5/5. Prime Directive: this beast exists objectively whether the player has the perception to recognize it.
name: Thunder Celestial Beast

canonical.appearance: Formless mass of living lightning vaguely shaped like a wolf, body crackles with nine colors of tribulation lightning. Born inside heavenly tribulations.

inner_dan_properties.alchemy_use: Thunder Celestial Beast core refines Nine-Tribulation Thunder Pills; ingredient for Immortal breakthrough
inner_dan_properties.canon_note: Born inside heavenly tribulations; their cores embody tribulation lightning itself

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
